 Hi, I used the last libgphoto2.diff provided in PR, but I corrected USES=
 gmake to USE_GMAKE=yes and wrote some new patches to ${FILESDIR}.
 
 graphics/gphoto2 worked with no extra patches.
 
 I also sent a diff to the upstream 'cos I realized that Fuji FinePix S2980
 is also supported, so I made a new entry in camlibs/ptp2/library.c
 
 I didn't tried the other patches submitted.
 
 Thanks for your work, Kato . :D , saved me a lot of problems!
